title: Not Operator
parameters: operand	Integer, Long, or Boolean expression.
description: Not is a unary operator (has one operand).  For Boolean expressions, Not returns True or False.  For number expressions, Not returns the bitwise complement on the value of the operand.  Each bit of the result is the complement of the corresponding bit in the operand, effectively changing 0 bits to 1, and 1 bits to 0.
see_also:

Not Operator Example

>print not 1

-2

>

Function main

		  Boolean result

result = False

If Not result Then

		    Print "result was true"

		  EndIf

		Fend
